## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Release preparation

## Checklist

- [ ] I kept the change focused.
- [ ] I updated tests for behavior changes.
- [ ] I updated README or module docs for public API changes.
- [ ] `gleam format --check src test` passes.
- [ ] `gleam test` passes.
- [ ] `gleam docs build` passes.

## Notes

Add migration notes, compatibility concerns, or follow-up work here.
